name: Austrian Chocolate Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt together chocolate and margarine in a medium saucepan.
2. Remove from heat and stir in sugar, egg, yolk, and vanilla.
3. Mix well. Stir in flour and nuts.
4. Shape into 3/4 inch balls. Place on ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 8-12 minutes.
6. Melt 1 square chocolate and 1 tablespoon margarine in a medium saucepan.
7. Remove from heat and stir in remaining ingredients until blended well.
8. Dip cookies into glaze to cover. Allow to dry completely before storing
in a tightly covered container with waxed paper between layers.
